titleStmt.title: SII 26.12: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 12. (A.R. No. 12 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This inscription, damaged in the last line, records the tax-free gift of the village Virāttalai in the Poṉṉamarāpati-ppaṟṟu together with a number of levies specified here for the maintenance of a taṇṇirpandal (water-shed) at Poṉṉamarāpati for the use of the people of the locality, established by Āṟkāḍukiḻār Tiruveṇkāḍuḍaiyār alias Vāṇādarāyar. A long list of taxes imposed at that time is also given.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 656.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ koṉerimaikoṇṭāṉ poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭārkku Āṟkāṭukiḻār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyārāṉa vāṇādharāyar poṉṉamarāpatiyil vaitta taṇṇirppantalukku Ipaṟṟil virāttalai muṉṟāvatu taimmātamutal mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili
yāka viṭṭu Ivvūrkku nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nattamum nattappāṭum nañcey puñceykkuñ ceykkuṭimai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai Āyam Uṭpaṭa palakaṭamaikaḷum muṉpilāṇṭukaḷum Iṟukkum mutalkaḷukku Upāti vaṭṭam teṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai
viṭaipperpeṟu pañcupili cantuvigrahappeṟu vācalviṉiyokam Olaieḻuttuviṉiyokam Ilaicciṉai viṉiyokam nittappaccai kāttikaippaccai Eṭuttukkāṭṭum paccai Eṇṇaippantam viṭṭuttevai Āṭtevai matiṭtevai taccuttevai koṟte
vai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippattintevai Aricikāṇattevai Āḷvari maṉaivari Ervari Iṉavari Iṭaivari taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam Ūcivāci Uṭpaṭṭa Aṉaittu Upātikaḷum varikaḷum Uṭpaṭṭa mutal mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat taṅkaḷ nāṭṭukku nicceyippāṉa mutalile va
riyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkaccoṉṉom Ippaṭikku candrādityavarai celvatākac cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭi Aṉupavittuppotumpaṭi paṇṇuka Ittaṉmam candra ttar varaiyāka nāṭṭār rakṣikkavum pārkka Ivai Okkūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu munṟāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟeṇpattaiñcu Ivai villavarāyar Eḻuttu
nta virāttalai ya yile poṉṉamarāpatiyil Uṭaiyār Irā- jentraśoḷiccuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Āṇṭoṉṟukkut tirumeyppūccukkup
patiṉeṭṭuppaṇamum Ittaṇṇirppantalil ceṉṟatikkai veṉṟapiḷḷaiyārkkut tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikku Āṇṭoṉṟukkup paṇṇiraṇṭu paṇamum tontomRead. tantom •Āṇṭārpakkalile candrādityarraiyum peṟṟu Uḷḷilum pantalilum tirumalaiyilum kalluveṭ
ṭiṉa paṭikaḷile Ākki vaitteṉ Aṟatta vaitteṉ kākkaBadly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 26.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
